class Node:
    def __init__(self, key, value, freq):
        self.key = key
        self.value = value
        self.freq = freq
        self.prev = None
        self.next = None

class DoublyLinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = Node(None, None, -1) # Dummy head
        self.tail = Node(None, None, -1) # Dummy tail
        self.head.next = self.tail
        self.tail.prev = self.head
        self.size = 0

    def add_node(self, node):
        """Adds node right before the tail (MRU)."""
        node.next = self.tail
        node.prev = self.tail.prev
        self.tail.prev.next = node
        self.tail.prev = node
        self.size += 1

    def remove_node(self, node):
        """Removes a specific node."""
        node.prev.next = node.next
        node.next.prev = node.prev
        node.prev = None
        node.next = None
        self.size -= 1
        
    def pop_front(self):
        """Removes and returns the node after head (LRU)."""
        if self.is_empty():
            return None
        node = self.head.next
        self.remove_node(node)
        return node
    
    def is_empty(self):
        return self.size == 0


class LFUCache:
    def __init__(self, capacity: int):
        self.capacity = capacity
        self.size = 0
        self.min_freq = 0
        self.key_to_node = {}  # Map key to Node object
        self.freq_to_dll = {}  # Map freq to DoublyLinkedList object

    def _update_freq(self, node):
        old_freq = node.freq
        
        # Remove node from its current DLL
        self.freq_to_dll[old_freq].remove_node(node)
        
        # If the old_freq DLL becomes empty, potentially update min_freq
        if self.freq_to_dll[old_freq].is_empty():
            del self.freq_to_dll[old_freq]
            if old_freq == self.min_freq:
                self.min_freq += 1 

        # Increment frequency
        node.freq += 1
        new_freq = node.freq
        
        # Add node to the new_freq DLL
        if new_freq not in self.freq_to_dll:
            self.freq_to_dll[new_freq] = DoublyLinkedList()
        self.freq_to_dll[new_freq].add_node(node)

    def get(self, key: int) -> int:
        if key not in self.key_to_node:
            return -1
        
        node = self.key_to_node[key]
        self._update_freq(node)
        return node.value

    def put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None:
        if self.capacity == 0:
            return

        if key in self.key_to_node:
            node = self.key_to_node[key]
            node.value = value
            self._update_freq(node)
        else:
            if self.size == self.capacity:
                # Evict LFU item (LRU among LFU)
                lfu_list = self.freq_to_dll[self.min_freq]
                node_to_remove = lfu_list.pop_front()
                
                del self.key_to_node[node_to_remove.key]
                self.size -= 1
                
                if lfu_list.is_empty():
                    del self.freq_to_dll[self.min_freq]

            # Add new node
            new_node = Node(key, value, 1)
            self.key_to_node[key] = new_node
            
            if 1 not in self.freq_to_dll:
                self.freq_to_dll[1] = DoublyLinkedList()
            self.freq_to_dll[1].add_node(new_node)
            
            self.min_freq = 1 # New item always starts at frequency 1, so min_freq becomes 1
            self.size += 1
